'''Mynnic''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] serving the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the final decades of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. Unlike some Jedi, Mynnic preferred to work with non-[[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitives]] to complete missions, going as far to create a band of adventurers that roamed [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] around [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]].

==Biography==
Discovered to be [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] at an early age by [[Jedi recruiter|representatives]] of the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]], Mynnic was taken to the [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] for [[Jedi training/Legends|training]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]. Passing through the [[Jedi academy|Temple academy]], Mynnic was trained as a [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] and built himself a blue-bladed [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] before completing his [[Jedi Trials/Legends|Trials of Knighthood]] and ascending to the rank of [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]]. Continuing his studies independently, Mynnic pursued the path of the [[Jedi Consular]] and went on long journey missions often. He wore the traditional [[Jedi apparel/Legends|robes]] of a Knight; though he wore a high-tech headband that hearkened to a tradition found on his homeworld.<ref name="JC" />

A wise and noble man, Mynnic's spirituality made him a great leader and thoughtful strategist. At some point in his travels Mynnic met the young [[Cerean/Legends|Cerean]] [[Noble/Legends|noble]] [[Pal-Han-Das]]; the [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] scoundrel [[Vinto]]; and a [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]] warrior named [[Wertsnik]]. All four formed a small group of compatriots who traveled around [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] around the time of the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]] resolving conflict without force when at all possible. At some point, the group came face to face with a group of [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]] and were forced to engage them in battle.<ref name="JC" />

==Behind the scenes==
Mynnic was originally featured in a [[Star Wars Gamer]] article in which he was supposed to show an example of combat to players of the [[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]. Mynnic's appearance was based on that of the [[Wikipedia:G.I. Joe|G.I. Joe]] character [[Wikipedia:Spirit (G.I. Joe)|Spirit Iron-Knife]].<ref name="JC" />
